lines.speaker: Pieve
lines.text: Welcome to my private little wyvern area.

lines.speaker: Pieve
lines.text: I'm Pieve. My big brother Steve made this training area, but he's gone off to be a Slayer Master to replace our cousin Nieve, so this area's mine now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is this wyvern area private?

lines.speaker: Pieve
lines.text: My brother, Steve, carved the steps to get up here. He was jealous of our cousin, Nieve, because she'd got a huge training cave where she could boss people around. So he made this place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So are you a Slayer Master?

lines.speaker: Pieve
lines.text: No, I'm not. My brother Steve is a Slayer Master. He took over the job from our cousin Nieve. All he has to do is tell people to kill stuff - he says it's easy!

sections.title: When attempting to kill monsters that aren't part of a player's slayer task

lines.speaker: Pieve
lines.text: That's not your assigned Slayer target. Up here, I expect people to focus on their Slayer training.
